info.name: Nova.OpsGroups.Api
info.description: Operations Groups API endpoints covering group tour task management.

item.name: Group Tour Tasks
item.description: 14 endpoints for managing group tour task operations: departures, activities, series, team members, SLA rules, and destinations. All request bodies include 7 auto-injected context fields.

body.raw:
{
  "tenant_id": "{{tenant_id}}",
  "company_code": "{{company_code}}",
  "branch_code": "{{branch_code}}",
  "user_id": "{{user_id}}",
  "browser_locale": "en-GB",
  "browser_timezone": "Europe/London",
  "ip_address": "203.0.113.42",
  "status_filter": "all",
  "date_from": "2026-03-01",
  "date_to": "2026-06-30",
  "series_code": null,
  "destination_code": null,
  "assigned_to": null,
  "search": null,
  "ops_manager": null,
  "ops_exec": null,
  "page": 1,
  "page_size": 100
}

request.description: Fetch filtered departure grid data with activity status summaries. Supports server-side pagination.

response.name: 422 Unprocessable Entity
